description: Available text models for the endproduct/document subtype (story / article / report / guide / lesson). The dispatcher writes the document body with the session's auto-routed text provider; this list is for an optional model picker + cost confirm. Local providers (user's own API key) are free; mchatai.com/cloud compute tokens apply to managed use.

models.notes: Default. Uses the wizard's auto-routed text provider for this session (capability-grid + routing ladder). No separate model pick needed.
